prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime key visual poster featuring an intense close-up portrait of Ponyo, a youthful androgynous warrior with pale warm skin, wet-looking black hair strands across the face, and piercing amber eyes staring directly at the viewer from under a massive ornate bird skull or raven-like metallic helmet. The helmet and shoulder armor are made of layered feather-shaped bronze and dark gold plates, with sharp beak forms, scratched engraved texture, tiny holes, and glowing ember-orange highlights; include one vivid red gem-like eye set into the upper bird mask. Use dramatic low-key lighting with black background, molten gold reflections, smoky orange rim light, and ultra-detailed painterly brushwork, creating a moody cinematic atmosphere. The composition is tightly cropped: the face fills the center, the helmet dominates the top and right side, claw-like feather armor crosses the lower foreground, and the bottom center contains the title text PONYO in a glowing pale-gold sharp gothic fantasy font with angular serifs. Use a 9:16 portrait canvas, high contrast, intricate textures, realistic anime illustration style, no border, no watermark, no extra text.
